what: The core idea: one layer, multiple views
title: Getting started with maplamina
text: contrast looks like . maplamina, idea becomes: core mental model package: single layer can multiple named states, user can move without duplicating layer definition.
code: # Repeating the layer for each year rmap() |>   add_circles(data, radius = ~value_2020, group = "2020") |>   add_circles(data, radius = ~value_2021, group = "2021") |>   add_circles(data, radius = ~value_2022, group = "2022") |>   add_layer_control(base_groups = c("2020", "2021", "2022")) maplamina() |>   add_circles(data) |>   add_views(     view("2020", radius = ~value_2020),     view("2021", radius = ~value_2021),     view("2022", radius = ~value_2022)   )

title: Getting started with maplamina
text: ’ll make small point dataset coordinates, region, three yearly values. Now create circle layer define three views map radius different column time. Even small example, code stays compact layer defined view-specific mapping changes.

title: Getting started with maplamina
text: add: range filter 2022 values select filter region often useful pattern exploratory work: one shared layer, several views, small number filters help narrow data interactively.
code: maplamina() |>   add_circles(     d,     stroke = FALSE,     fill_color = "darkblue"   ) |>   add_views(     view("2020", radius = ~value_2020),     view("2021", radius = ~value_2021),     view("2022", radius = ~value_2022)   ) |>   add_filters(     filter_range(~value_2022),     filter_select(~region)   )

title: Getting started with maplamina
text: Treating views first-class concept keeps code closer underlying analysis problem. comparing: years scenarios metrics model outputs alternative classifications often dealing different layers conceptual sense. looking layer different states. Expressing directly tends make code shorter, easier maintain, easier extend. becomes especially helpful number comparisons grows. Adding fourth fifth view just another view(...) call, rather another duplicated layer block.

title: Getting started with maplamina
text: vignette focuses basic pattern : create map add layer define one views add filters , next useful functions explore : add_summaries() headline summary values add_legend() map legends add_panel() section() / sections() optional UI layout layer types add_lines(), add_polygons(), add_icons(), add_markers()

title: Authors and Citation
text: Jack Humble. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Humble J (2026). maplamina: High-Performance 'WebGL' Mapping Widgets R. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/jhumbl/maplamina.
code: @Manual{,   title = {maplamina: High-Performance 'WebGL' Mapping Widgets for R},   author = {Jack Humble},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/jhumbl/maplamina}, }

what: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: GPU-accelerated interactive maps R (MapLibre GL + deck.gl via htmlwidgets). Documentation: https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/ Fast: WebGL rendering binary (typed-array) attributes smooth interaction millions features. R-native syntax: pipe-friendly add_*() verbs plus formula mappings like radius = ~value. First-class components: views, filters, summaries built - layer-control workarounds. Composable UI: bind components shared controls, mount optional panel UI. sf-friendly: works naturally sf objects points, lines, polygons. Quarto/R Markdown ready: designed drop reports dashboards.

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: Install CRAN: install development version GitHub:
code: install.packages("maplamina") # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("jhumbl/maplamina")

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: minimal example layer multiple views transitioning different radius sizes, GPU-accelerated filter.
code: set.seed(1) n <- 2000 d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(n, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(n, -60, 60),   value = runif(n, 1, 10) )  maplamina() |>   add_circles(d, stroke = FALSE, fill_color = "darkblue") |>   add_views(     view("Value",         radius = ~value),     view("Inverse Value", radius = ~(max(value) - value + 1))   ) |>   add_filters(       filter_range(~value)   )

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: filter_range() numeric slider filter_select() categorical selector summary_count(), summary_mean(), summary_min(), summary_max(), summary_sum() Tooltips/popups: tmpl() Optional UI: add_panel() + section() / sections() Legends: add_legend()

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: add_circles() points/circles add_lines() paths/lines add_polygons() filled polygons (+ stroke) add_icons() / add_markers() point icons/markers

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
code: maplamina() |>   add_circles(big_dataset, radius=~value) |>   add_filters(     filter_range(~value)   )

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: Browse function docs: ?maplamina, ?add_circles, ?add_views, ?add_filters, ?add_summaries. Found bug want feature? Please open issue GitHub: https://github.com/jhumbl/maplamina/issues

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: Planned improvements include layer types, additional components, alternative themes.

title: High-Performance WebGL Mapping Widgets for R
text: MIT.

title: Add a circle layer — add_circles
text: Adds GPU-rendered circle layer (points). Use formulas (e.g. ~mag * 2) map columns aesthetics.

title: Add a circle layer — add_circles
code: add_circles(   map,   data = NULL,   lon = NULL,   lat = NULL,   color = "darkblue",   opacity = 1,   width = 1,   fill_color = "dodgerblue",   fill_opacity = 0.8,   radius = 6,   stroke = TRUE,   tooltip = NULL,   popup = NULL,   id = NULL,   group = NULL,   pickable = TRUE,   radius_units = c("pixels", "meters", "common"),   radius_min_pixels = NULL,   radius_max_pixels = NULL,   width_units = c("pixels", "meters", "common"),   width_min_pixels = NULL,   width_max_pixels = NULL )

title: Add a circle layer — add_circles
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). data Data layer. NULL, uses default data supplied maplamina(). lon, lat Longitude/latitude aesthetics (formula scalar). Required non-sf data. color, opacity, width Stroke color/opacity/width. fill_color, fill_opacity Fill color/opacity. fill_color can single color, vector colors, color scale spec color_quantile(). radius Circle radius (numeric formula). stroke Logical; draw circle stroke. tooltip, popup Optional tmpl() objects (NULL) hover/click content. id, group Optional layer id group name. pickable Logical; whether features can picked (tooltip/popup). radius_units Units radius; one "pixels", "meters", "common". radius_min_pixels, radius_max_pixels Optional clamp pixels using meter/common units. width_units Units stroke width; one "pixels", "meters", "common". width_min_pixels, width_max_pixels Optional clamp pixels using meter/common units.

title: Add a circle layer — add_circles
text: modified map widget.

title: Add a circle layer — add_circles

what: Add filters to a layer — add_filters
title: Add filters to a layer — add_filters
text: Registers one filters layer. multiple layers share bind, controls merge across layers (bind, label, type).

title: Add filters to a layer — add_filters
code: add_filters(map, ..., id = NULL, bind = NULL, position = NULL, layer_id = NULL)

title: Add filters to a layer — add_filters
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). ... One filter_range() / filter_select() objects (single list ). id Optional id used shorthand bind id bind omitted. bind Bind group id shared UI control. position Optional UI position hint (applied control group). layer_id Target layer id (defaults recently added layer).

title: Add filters to a layer — add_filters
text: modified map widget.

title: Add an icon layer — add_icons
text: Adds point icon layer. Icons referenced id (resolved frontend icon set).

title: Add an icon layer — add_icons
code: add_icons(   map,   data = NULL,   lon = NULL,   lat = NULL,   icon = "marker",   size = 18,   color = "#3388ff",   opacity = 1,   tooltip = NULL,   popup = NULL,   id = NULL,   group = NULL,   pickable = TRUE,   size_units = c("pixels", "meters", "common"),   size_min_pixels = NULL,   size_max_pixels = 64,   icon_anchor = NULL,   mask = TRUE,   occlude = FALSE )

title: Add an icon layer — add_icons
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). data Data layer. NULL, uses default data supplied maplamina(). lon, lat Longitude/latitude aesthetics (formula scalar). Required non-sf data. icon Icon id string (e.g. "marker"). size, color, opacity Icon size color/opacity (can formulas). tooltip, popup Optional tmpl() objects (NULL) hover/click content. id, group Optional layer id group name. pickable Logical; whether features can picked (tooltip/popup). size_units Units size; one "pixels", "meters", "common". size_min_pixels, size_max_pixels Optional clamp pixels using meter/common units. icon_anchor Optional anchor (frontend-specific). mask Logical; whether mask icon. occlude Logical; whether icons occlude .

title: Add an icon layer — add_icons
text: modified map widget.

code: d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   value = runif(1000, 1, 10) ) maplamina() |>   add_icons(d, icon = "star", size = 20)  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"icon1":{"id":"icon1","type":"icon","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"size":{"value":20},"fillColor":{"value":[51,136,255,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":false,"sizeUnits":"pixels","sizeMaxPixels":64,"icon":"star","mask":true,"occlude":false},"bbox":[-59.73386334255338,-59.94284816086292,59.979925788939,59.98472535051405],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_7c5f67386452de1c":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_7c5f67386452de1c"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":[],".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}

title: Add a legend component — add_legend
text: Adds categorical continuous legend. Legends can conditionally displayed based layer/view, can mounted via panel bind.

title: Add a legend component — add_legend
code: add_legend(   map,   title = NULL,   type = c("categorical", "continuous"),   position = c("bottomleft", "bottomright", "topleft", "topright"),   values = NULL,   colors = NULL,   shapes = "square",   sizes = NULL,   range = NULL,   labels = NULL,   breaks = NULL,   gradient = NULL,   shape = "square",   size = 12,   layer = NULL,   view = NULL,   bind = NULL,   id = NULL )

title: Add a legend component — add_legend
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). title Optional legend title. type Legend type: "categorical" "continuous". position Legend position hint: "bottomleft", "bottomright", "topleft", "topright". values, colors Categorical legend labels colors (length). shapes, sizes Optional categorical shapes/sizes (length 1 length(values)). range, labels, breaks Continuous legend range/labels/breaks. gradient Vector 2+ colors continuous legend. shape, size Continuous legend swatch/shape size. layer, view Optional conditional display rule. bind Bind group id mounting panel (defaults legend id). id Optional component id (otherwise generated).

title: Add a legend component — add_legend
text: modified map widget.

text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). data Data layer. Typically sf object LINESTRING geometry. color, opacity, width Line color/opacity/width. tooltip, popup Optional tmpl() objects (NULL) hover/click content. id, group Optional layer id group name. pickable Logical; whether features can picked (tooltip/popup). width_units Units width; one "meters", "pixels", "common". width_min_pixels, width_max_pixels Optional clamp pixels using meter/common units.

what: Add a global, presentation-only panel — add_panel

title: Add a global, presentation-only panel — add_panel
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). title Panel title. description Optional panel description. icon Optional URL small icon shown beside title. dividers Logical; whether render divider lines sections. position Optional corner position panel container: "topleft", "topright", "bottomleft", "bottomright". sections Panel layout, created sections(section("id"), ...).

title: Add a global, presentation-only panel — add_panel
text: modified map widget.

title: Add a global, presentation-only panel — add_panel
code: d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   value = runif(1000, 1, 10) ) maplamina() |>   add_circles(d) |>   add_filters(filter_range(~value), bind = "filters") |>   add_panel(sections = sections(section("filters"))) title: Add a polygon layer — add_polygons
text: Adds polygon layer (fill + optional stroke). data-driven fills, use color scale spec color_quantile() color_factor().

title: Add a polygon layer — add_polygons
code: add_polygons(   map,   data = NULL,   color = "darkblue",   opacity = 1,   width = 1,   fill_color = "dodgerblue",   fill_opacity = 0.6,   stroke = TRUE,   elevation = NULL,   elevation_scale = 1,   tooltip = NULL,   popup = NULL,   id = NULL,   group = NULL,   pickable = TRUE,   width_units = c("pixels", "meters", "common"),   width_min_pixels = NULL,   width_max_pixels = NULL )

title: Add a polygon layer — add_polygons
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). data Data layer. Typically sf object POLYGON/MULTIPOLYGON geometry. color, opacity, width Stroke color/opacity/width. fill_color, fill_opacity Fill color/opacity. fill_color can single color, vector colors, color scale spec color_quantile(). stroke Logical; draw polygon stroke. elevation, elevation_scale Optional extrusion height (numeric formula) scale. tooltip, popup Optional tmpl() objects (NULL) hover/click content. id, group Optional layer id group name. pickable Logical; whether features can picked (tooltip/popup). width_units Units stroke width; one "pixels", "meters", "common". width_min_pixels, width_max_pixels Optional clamp pixels using meter/common units.

title: Add a polygon layer — add_polygons
text: modified map widget.

title: Add a polygon layer — add_polygons
code: if (requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)) {   nc <- sf::st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package = "sf"), quiet = TRUE)   maplamina(nc) |>     add_polygons(fill_color = color_quantile(~BIR74), stroke = FALSE) } text: Add MapLibre scale bar

title: Add MapLibre scale bar — add_scalebar

what: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries
title: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries
text: Registers one summary rows update filtering. multiple layers share bind, single summaries card can created.

title: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries
code: add_summaries(   map,   ...,   id = NULL,   bind = NULL,   position = NULL,   layer_id = NULL )

title: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). ... One summary_*() objects (single list ). id Optional id used shorthand bind id bind omitted. bind Bind group id shared UI control. position Optional UI position hint (applied control group). layer_id Target layer id (defaults recently added layer).

title: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries
text: modified map widget.

title: Add summaries to a layer — add_summaries

what: Add views to a layer — add_views
title: Add views to a layer — add_views
text: Registers per-layer views component. multiple layers share bind, single selector control created.

title: Add views to a layer — add_views
code: add_views(   map,   ...,   id = NULL,   bind = NULL,   position = NULL,   layer_id = NULL,   duration = 750,   easing = c("smoothstep", "linear", "easein", "easeout", "easeinout", "easeInOutCubic") )

title: Add views to a layer — add_views
text: map maplamina widget created maplamina(). ... One view() objects (single list ). id Optional component id (also used default bind id). bind Bind group id shared UI control. omitted, defaults id (auto id). position Optional UI position hint (applied control group). layer_id Target layer id (defaults recently added layer). duration Animation duration (ms) switching views. easing Easing function name switching views.

title: Add views to a layer — add_views
text: modified map widget.

title: Add views to a layer — add_views
code: d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   value = runif(1000, 1, 10) ) maplamina() |>   add_circles(d, radius = 5) |>   add_views(     view("magnitude", radius = ~value * 3),     view("faint", fill_opacity = 0.2)   )  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"circle1":{"id":"circle1","type":"circle","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"radius":{"value":5},"lineWidth":{"value":1},"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,204]},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":true,"radiusUnits":"pixels","lineWidthUnits":"pixels"},"bbox":[-59.90698205307126,-59.94941404089332,59.98007895424962,59.92165996693075],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_5d48858d703a0176":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":1000},"blob_3e23bd23cbc25831":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_3e23bd23cbc25831","vw.views1.magnitude.radius":"blob_5d48858d703a0176"}}}},".__components":{"views":{"views1":{"type":"views","id":"views1","layer":"circle1","bind":"views1","position":null,"motion":{"duration":750,"easing":"smoothstep"},"views":{"magnitude":{"encodings":{"radius":{"value":{"ref":"vw.views1.magnitude.radius"}}}},"faint":{"encodings":{"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,51]}}}}}},"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":{"views1":{"type":"views","members":["views1"],"view_names":["magnitude","faint"],"default":"magnitude"}},".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}

title: Basemap tile styles — base_tiles
text: named list MapLibre-compatible style URLs common open-source basemaps. Pass entry directly style argument maplamina.

title: Basemap tile styles — base_tiles
code: base_tiles

title: Basemap tile styles — base_tiles
text: named list character strings (URLs). carto_positron Light basemap labels. Good default thematic maps. carto_positron_nolabels Light basemap without labels. Clean background dense data. carto_dark_matter Dark basemap labels. Good glowing point layers. carto_dark_matter_nolabels Dark basemap without labels. carto_voyager Colored basemap labels. geographic detail Positron. carto_voyager_nolabels Colored basemap without labels. openfreemap_liberty OSM Liberty style hosted OpenFreeMap. API key required. openfreemap_bright OSM Bright style hosted OpenFreeMap. API key required. openfreemap_positron Positron style hosted OpenFreeMap. API key required. demotiles MapLibre demo tiles. Lightweight, API key, useful testing.

title: Basemap tile styles — base_tiles
code: # Polygons example (sf ships the nc shapefile) if (requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)) {   nc <- sf::st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package = "sf"), quiet = TRUE)    maplamina(nc) |>     add_polygons(fill_color = color_quantile(~BIR74), stroke = FALSE)    maplamina(nc, style = base_tiles$carto_dark_matter) |>     add_polygons(fill_color = color_quantile(~BIR74, "Inferno"), stroke = FALSE) }  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/dark-matter-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"polygon1":{"id":"polygon1","type":"polygon","group":null,"data_columns":{"polygon":{"positions":{"ref":"poly.pos"},"ring_starts":{"ref":"poly.rings"},"poly_starts":{"ref":"poly.starts"},"length":108,"size":2},"feature_index":{"values":{"ref":"feature_index"}},"fillColor":{"encoding":"dict","dict_rgba":{"ref":"fillColor.dict_rgba"},"codes":{"ref":"fillColor.codes"}}},"base_encodings":{"lineWidth":{"value":1},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":false,"lineWidthUnits":"pixels","elevationScale":1},"bbox":[-84.3238525390625,33.88199234008789,-75.45697784423828,36.58964920043945],"coordinate_origin":[-79.89041519165039,35.23582077026367],"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_393c16c84b1ac979":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":4842},"blob_aa353b4d09d704ce":{"dtype":"u32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":108},"blob_f428d3b7d48b8a15":{"dtype":"u32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":108},"blob_9400fabfe7f979b1":{"dtype":"u32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":108},"blob_7211158f21815086":{"dtype":"u32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":108},"blob_177178366375d7a6":{"dtype":"u8","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,BAQEmWERY5nFMnCZ9pQimf/+npk="},"length":20,"size":4}},"refs":{"fillColor.codes":"blob_9400fabfe7f979b1","poly.rings":"blob_aa353b4d09d704ce","poly.pos":"blob_393c16c84b1ac979","fillColor.dict_rgba":"blob_177178366375d7a6","poly.starts":"blob_7211158f21815086","feature_index":"blob_f428d3b7d48b8a15"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__con what: Binned (equal-interval or manual breaks) color scale specification — color_bin
title: Binned (equal-interval or manual breaks) color scale specification — color_bin
text: Binned (equal-interval manual breaks) color scale specification

title: Binned (equal-interval or manual breaks) color scale specification — color_bin
code: color_bin(   expr,   palette = NULL,   bins = 5,   domain = NULL,   na_color = "#00000000",   reverse = FALSE,   clamp = TRUE )

title: Binned (equal-interval or manual breaks) color scale specification — color_bin
text: expr formula selecting numeric column (e.g. ~value). palette NULL, palette name, vector colors. bins Number bins, numeric vector breakpoints. domain Optional numeric range c(min, max); defaults data range. na_color Color used missing values. reverse Logical; reverse palette. clamp Logical; TRUE, clamp values outside domain ends.

title: Binned (equal-interval or manual breaks) color scale specification — color_bin
text: color scale specification object.

title: Categorical color scale specification — color_factor
text: Categorical color scale specification

title: Categorical color scale specification — color_factor
code: color_factor(   expr,   palette = NULL,   domain = NULL,   na_color = "#00000000",   reverse = FALSE )

title: Categorical color scale specification — color_factor
text: expr formula selecting categorical column (e.g. ~region). palette NULL, palette name, vector colors. domain Optional character vector levels (controls ordering levels shown). na_color Color used missing values. reverse Logical; reverse palette.

title: Categorical color scale specification — color_factor
text: color scale specification object.

title: Continuous color scale specification — color_numeric
text: Creates numeric color scale spec resolved widget compilation. Use color/fill_color aesthetics (e.g. fill_color = color_numeric(~x)).

title: Continuous color scale specification — color_numeric
code: color_numeric(   expr,   palette = NULL,   domain = NULL,   steps = 256L,   na_color = "#00000000",   reverse = FALSE,   clamp = TRUE )

title: Continuous color scale specification — color_numeric
text: expr formula selecting numeric column (e.g. ~value). palette NULL, palette name (passed grDevices::hcl.colors()), vector colors. domain Optional numeric range c(min, max); defaults data range. steps Number palette steps interpolation. na_color Color used missing values. reverse Logical; reverse palette. clamp Logical; TRUE, clamp values outside domain ends.

title: Continuous color scale specification — color_numeric
text: color scale specification object.

title: Continuous color scale specification — color_numeric
code: if (requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)) {   nc <- sf::st_read(system.file("shape/nc.shp", package = "sf"), quiet = TRUE)   maplamina(nc) |>     add_polygons(fill_color = color_numeric(~BIR74)) } title: Quantile color scale specification — color_quantile
text: Quantile color scale specification

title: Quantile color scale specification — color_quantile
code: color_quantile(   expr,   palette = NULL,   n = 5,   domain = NULL,   na_color = "#00000000",   reverse = FALSE,   clamp = TRUE )

title: Quantile color scale specification — color_quantile
text: expr formula selecting numeric column (e.g. ~value). palette NULL, palette name, vector colors. n Number quantile bins. domain Optional numeric range c(min, max); defaults data range. na_color Color used missing values. reverse Logical; reverse palette. clamp Logical; TRUE, clamp values outside domain ends.

title: Quantile color scale specification — color_quantile
text: color scale specification object.

title: Define a range filter — filter_range
text: Creates numeric range filter specification registered add_filters().

title: Define a range filter — filter_range
code: filter_range(   col,   label = NULL,   default = NULL,   min = NULL,   max = NULL,   step = NULL,   live = TRUE,   id = NULL )

title: Define a range filter — filter_range
text: col formula selecting numeric column (e.g. ~mag). label Optional label UI control (defaults column name). default Optional default range c(min, max) (length 2). min, max Optional explicit min/max (otherwise computed data). step Optional step size UI slider. live Logical; update map continuously dragging. id Optional filter id (otherwise generated).

title: Define a range filter — filter_range
text: filter specification object.

title: Define a range filter — filter_range
code: f <- filter_range(~mpg, default = c(15, 30)) f #> $type #> [1] "range" #>  #> $id #> NULL #>  #> $column #> ~mpg #> <environment: 0x556c6bfeecd0> #>  #> $label #> NULL #>  #> $default #> [1] 15 30 #>  #> $min #> NULL #>  #> $max #> NULL #>  #> $step #> NULL #>  #> $live #> [1] TRUE #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "ml_filter"

title: Define a select filter — filter_select
text: Creates categorical filter specification registered add_filters().

title: Define a select filter — filter_select
code: filter_select(   col,   label = NULL,   multi = TRUE,   dropdown = NULL,   searchable = TRUE,   default = NULL,   max_levels = NULL,   id = NULL )

title: Define a select filter — filter_select
text: col formula selecting column (e.g. ~region). label Optional label UI control (defaults column name). multi Logical; allow multiple selections. dropdown Optional UI hint (frontend-specific). searchable Logical; allow searching within options. default Optional default selection(s). max_levels Optional maximum number levels show (frontend may truncate). id Optional filter id (otherwise generated).

title: Define a select filter — filter_select
text: filter specification object.

title: Define a select filter — filter_select
code: f <- filter_select(~Species, default = c("setosa", "versicolor")) f #> $type #> [1] "select" #>  #> $id #> NULL #>  #> $column #> ~Species #> <environment: 0x556c6fffd888> #>  #> $label #> NULL #>  #> $multi #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $dropdown #> NULL #>  #> $searchable #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $default #> [1] "setosa"     "versicolor" #>  #> $max_levels #> NULL #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "ml_filter"

what: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
title: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
text: Creates interactive MapLibre + deck.gl map widget. can add layers UI components (views/filters/summaries/panel) add_*() functions.

title: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
code: maplamina(   data = NULL,   style = "https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json",   projection = c("mercator", "globe"),   dragRotate = FALSE,   fit_bounds = TRUE,   show_layer_controls = TRUE,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   elementId = NULL )

title: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
text: data Optional default dataset used subsequent add_*() calls data argument NULL. style MapLibre style URL (named style base_tiles). projection Map projection; one "mercator" "globe". dragRotate Logical; whether drag-rotate enabled (also affects compass). fit_bounds Logical; whether map initially fits bounds layers. show_layer_controls Logical; show built-per-layer visibility controls. width, height Widget width/height (CSS units numeric pixels). height NULL, viewer-friendly default used. elementId Optional HTML element id.

title: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
text: htmlwidget maplamina widget.

title: Create a Maplamina map widget — maplamina
code: # Minimal widget maplamina()  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":[],".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":[],".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]} # With a Circle layer d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   value = runif(1000, 1, 10) ) maplamina() |>   add_circles(d)  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"circle1":{"id":"circle1","type":"circle","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"radius":{"value":6},"lineWidth":{"value":1},"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,204]},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":true,"radiusUnits":"pixels","lineWidthUnits":"pixels"},"bbox":[-59.98595067299902,-59.87618302926421,59.60809590294957,59.97976329177618],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_2fdfcf3881fd83d3":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_2fdfcf3881fd83d3"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":[],".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}

what: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
title: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
text: Panel sections refer bind ids created components add_views(), add_filters(), add_summaries().

title: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
code: section(id)

title: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
text: id Bind id (e.g. bind supplied add_views/add_filters, component id bind omitted).

title: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
text: panel section object.

title: Create a panel section that mounts a control by bind id — section
code: section("filters") #> $id #> [1] "filters" #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "maplamina_panel_section"

what: Create a list of panel sections — sections
title: Create a list of panel sections — sections
text: Create list panel sections

title: Create a list of panel sections — sections
code: sections(...)

title: Create a list of panel sections — sections
text: ... One section() objects, character ids, lists sections.

title: Create a list of panel sections — sections
text: panel sections container.

title: Create a list of panel sections — sections
code: sections(section("views"), section("filters")) #> [[1]] #> $id #> [1] "views" #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "maplamina_panel_section" #>  #> [[2]] #> $id #> [1] "filters" #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "maplamina_panel_section" #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "maplamina_panel_sections"

title: Summary: count rows — summary_count
text: Counts number filtered rows.

title: Summary: count rows — summary_count
code: summary_count(   col = NULL,   label = NULL,   digits = NULL,   prefix = NULL,   suffix = NULL,   id = NULL )

title: Summary: count rows — summary_count
text: col Optional formula like ~id (validated provided). label Display label summary row. digits Optional number digits formatting (applied JS). prefix, suffix Optional prefix/suffix strings (applied JS). id Optional summary id.

title: Summary: count rows — summary_count
text: summary specification object.

title: Create a tooltip/popup template — tmpl
text: Templates use placeholders like {col} {col:.1f}. Values gathered widget compilation fast rendering browser.

title: Create a tooltip/popup template — tmpl
code: tmpl(template, ..., html = FALSE)

title: Create a tooltip/popup template — tmpl
text: template single template string. ... Optional named expressions bind placeholders (e.g. mag = ~mag). omitted, placeholders resolved column name. html Logical; TRUE, template treated HTML.

title: Create a tooltip/popup template — tmpl
text: template specification object.

title: Create a tooltip/popup template — tmpl
code: d <- data.frame(   lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),   value = runif(1000, 1, 10) ) maplamina() |>   add_circles(d, tooltip = tmpl("Value: {value:.1f}"))  {"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"circle1":{"id":"circle1","type":"circle","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"radius":{"value":6},"lineWidth":{"value":1},"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,204]},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":true,"radiusUnits":"pixels","lineWidthUnits":"pixels"},"bbox":[-59.90178507752717,-59.93979139253497,59.86342627555132,59.92544685490429],"coordinate_origin":null,"tooltip":{"type":"template","template":"Value: {value:.1f}","html":false,"placeholders":[{"kind":"numeric-f32","name":"value","fmt":".1f","value":{"ref":"tpl.tooltip.1.value"}}]},"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_c17f403d11f87af2":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":1000},"blob_4e20d18c5253b292":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_4e20d18c5253b292","tpl.tooltip.1.value":"blob_c17f403d11f87af2"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":[],".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}

title: Deprecated transition helper — transition
text: transition() removed. Configure animated view switching via add_views() using duration easing.

title: Deprecated transition helper — transition
code: transition(...)

title: Deprecated transition helper — transition
text: ... Ignored.

title: Deprecated transition helper — transition
text: function always errors Defunct.

title: Define a view — view
text: view named set overrides (e.g. radius/opacity) can switched via shared views selector created add_views().

title: Define a view — view
code: view(name, ...)

title: Define a view — view
text: name View name shown UI. ... Named overrides layer aesthetics (e.g. radius = ~mag * 3, opacity = 0.3).

title: Define a view — view
text: view specification object.

title: Define a view — view
code: v <- view("magnitude", radius = ~mag * 3) v #> $name #> [1] "magnitude" #>  #> $overrides #> $overrides$radius #> ~mag * 3 #>  #> attr(,"ml_env") #> <environment: 0x556c6ea1f408> #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "ml_view"

title: maplamina 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-03-06 Initial CRAN release. GPU-accelerated layers points, lines, polygons, icons, markers. View, filter summary components bindable controls panel mounting. Views support animated switching configurable transition duration easing.
